settings.title: A New Restorative Class for Tired Evenings
settings.excerpt: Our Wednesday evening slow flow is now a fully restorative class, built for unwinding rather than working out.
settings.body:
Not every practice needs to leave you sweaty. We have reshaped our Wednesday evening class at Stillpoint into a properly restorative session, held with bolsters, blankets, and very few poses.

Each shape is held for several quiet minutes, supported so your body can fully let go. There is no pushing, no flowing, just slow breath and gentle release at the end of a long day.

It suits everyone, including complete beginners and anyone carrying tension or stiffness. You will likely sleep better that night.

Mats and props are provided. Come straight from work if you need to, no special preparation required.
